title: Correct VPR-2 claims: prototype status matrix; tables not microservices; multi-maturity; mass/axle disabled; keep R3F
summary: Retract overclaims of production-ready R2 / five independent databases / shader/procedure engines. Honest label: EDTS VPR-2 Architecture and Interaction Prototype. Keep real R3F procedural truck (not CSS cards). Domains = normalized tables in one DB + object store + client view-state. Separate identity/geometry/placement/mass/interface maturity. Mass and axle outputs disabled until coverage. Timeline = storyboard. Next milestone = GLB/mesh mapping with orbit/select/search/inspect for ≥5 components.
claim_corrections: Six domains, implemented as tables — not five independent DBs
R3F scene exists with procedural meshes — not CSS mock; GLB not yet
Camera Box3 framing prototyped — not full occlusion-aware traversal
Heatmap = mesh material override prototype — not custom GLSL shader
Timeline = storyboard — not topological procedure engine
Mass/axle = disabled — not demonstration engineering results
Multi-dimension maturity required — single badge insufficient
next_milestone: Map real GLB or higher-fidelity meshes to ≥5 comp_ids; orbit, hover, select, isolate, search-frame, evidence panel — no invented mass/VERIFIED geometry
